---
title: "Quantum MRI Pulse Simulation"
author: "BTArtuch"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    header-includes: |
      \usepackage{physics}
      \usepackage{amsmath}
      \usepackage{braket}
---

## Overview
Write your portfolio text here using standard Markdown and inline TeX.

![Measurement Result](Meas.png)

$$
\hat{H} = \hbar \omega_0 \hat{S}_z + \hbar \Omega \cos(\omega t) \hat{S}_x
$$
